exhibits_walked.name: Franchise Agreement (Traditional)
exhibits_walked.method: Direct page-by-page text walk of all 15 pages
exhibits_walked.key_findings: All operative provisions directly read and structured in RT_depth_contract_burdens.json

exhibits_walked.name: Financial Statements
exhibits_walked.method: Direct text extraction of all 15 pages
exhibits_walked.key_findings: Auditor report, 4 financial statements, 14 note families — all fully walked

exhibits_walked.name: New Term Policy
exhibits_walked.method: Key terms surfaced via Item 17 and Item 6 footnotes
exhibits_walked.deferred_rationale: 2-page policy. Core operative substance (no renewal right, rent not lower, 8.50% minimum, discretionary) fully surfaced in Item 17 and Item 6 footnote 3. Direct text walk would add template details but no additional operative burden beyond what is disclosed in the body.
exhibits_walked.already_recovered_elsewhere: Item 17 chart (row b), Item 6 footnote 3, Item 17 Note 2
exhibits_walked.missing_despite_deferral: Exact procedural steps in new term evaluation process

exhibits_walked.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits_walked.method: Direct text walk of all 5 pages
exhibits_walked.key_findings: 5 state addenda (CA, MD, MN, ND, WA) + state effective dates. All overrides structured in RT_depth_state_addenda_promotion.json

exhibits_deferred.name: Franchise Agreement (Satellite)
exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: Parallel structure to Exhibit B (Traditional FA). Satellites represent <5% of system. Key differences (term, fees, menu) surfaced in Items 1, 5, 6. Full clause walk would largely duplicate Exhibit B findings.
exhibits_deferred.recovered_elsewhere: Item 1 (restaurant types), Item 5 (fees), Item 6 (satellite fees), Item 17 (terms)
exhibits_deferred.missing: Satellite-specific clause variations, if any, beyond what Items 1/5/6/17 disclose

exhibits_deferred.name: Franchise Agreement (Walmart)
exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: Parallel structure to Exhibit B. Walmart locations are a small subset. Key differences surfaced in Items 1, 5, 6.
exhibits_deferred.recovered_elsewhere: Item 1 (MIW description), Item 5 ($0 initial fee), Item 6 (MIW rent 14-15.5%)

exhibits_deferred.name: Operator's Lease
exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: 33-page standard commercial lease. Key operative provisions fully surfaced via Item 9 obligations table (15 cross-references to Operator's Lease sections) and Item 17 Operator's Lease table (all provision summaries). Rent terms extensively documented in Item 6 footnotes 3, 4, 6, 7, 8. Direct walk would extract standard lease boilerplate.
exhibits_deferred.recovered_elsewhere: Item 9 (24 obligations with lease section references), Item 17 (full Operator's Lease provision table), Item 6 (complete rent structure with 12 footnotes)
exhibits_deferred.missing: Specific lease holdover provisions, environmental clauses, casualty/condemnation detail, subletting restrictions beyond what Item 17 discloses

exhibits_deferred.name: Loan and Related Documents
exhibits_deferred.why_deferred: 35-page template document set. Key terms (interest rate, amortization, security, personal guarantee, jury waiver, Operator Assistance Program waiver) fully surfaced in Item 10. Loan is optional; not all franchisees use it.
exhibits_deferred.recovered_elsewhere: Item 10 (complete loan terms: SOFR + 0.10% + 3.00%, APR 7.42%, 3-5 year term, 7-year amortization, security, guarantee, waiver)
exhibits_deferred.missing: Specific default triggers in Promissory Note, cross-default mechanics, exact OAPA waiver language
